summary: Tested Dine CuratedConciergeSection UI/UX fixes and trait derivation. All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend displays correctly with high-contrast text, solid CTA buttons, and personalized why_for_pet text.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend trait derivation working: Mystique's separation_anxiety='Moderate' correctly derives 'anxious' trait
why_for_pet displays personalized text: 'Designed for Mystique's calm-and-comfortable style'
CTA buttons are solid colors (bg-pink-500 for products, bg-purple-500 for services) - no gradients
Card text has high contrast: white titles on dark background (bg-gradient-to-br from-gray-900 to-gray-800)
The why_for_pet line appears above CTA buttons with amber styling (text-amber-300/90)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing Mystique pet data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dine CuratedConciergeSection fully tested. Backend derives traits from personality.separation_anxiety and personality.temperament fields. Mystique gets 'anxious', 'playful', 'social' traits. Frontend shows dark container with high-contrast cards, solid color CTAs, and amber why_for_pet text.

frontend.high_contrast_text: PASS - White text on dark background
frontend.why_for_pet_amber: PASS - '✦ Designed for Mystique's calm-and-comfortable style'

screenshots: .screenshots/02_dine_page_top.png - Shows logged-in dine page with CuratedConciergeSection

visual_checks.text_contrast: High - white titles on dark gray-900 background
visual_checks.button_colors: Solid pink (#ec4899) and purple (#8b5cf6) - no gradients
visual_checks.why_for_pet_placement: Above CTA button with amber text and ✦ symbol
